name: email-marketing-bible
description: Comprehensive, data-backed email marketing knowledge base. 908 sources, 4,798 insights. Use when reviewing email setups, building automation flows, diagnosing deliverability, writing email copy, selecting platforms, or pulling benchmarks. Covers strategy, flows, deliverability, copywriting, segmentation, compliance, cold email, and 19 industry playbooks.
capabilities: Review and audit email marketing setups across flows, segments, and deliverability
Draft email copy using proven frameworks (PAS, AIDA, BAB, Soap Opera Sequence)
Build automation flows including welcome series, abandoned cart, post-purchase, and win-back sequences
Provide industry-specific benchmarks for open rates, click rates, and conversion rates across 19 verticals
Diagnose inbox placement and deliverability issues with a 10-step framework
Compare email platforms (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Kit, beehiiv, etc.) based on specific use cases
author: CosmoBlk
securitySummary: This skill is a static markdown knowledge base containing only informational content about email marketing. All static scanner findings are false positives: backticks are markdown code fences (not shell execution), cryptographic algorithm mentions are contextual references (not code), URLs are documentation links (not network exfiltration), and there is no credential access or code execution capability. Safe for publication.
valueStatement: Transform Claude into an email marketing expert with 55,000 words of data-backed insights, 908 sources, and 19 industry-specific playbooks for building automation flows, improving deliverability, and writing high-converting email copy.
limitations: Does not directly connect to email platforms or ESP APIs
Cannot send emails or manage subscriber data directly
Provides strategic guidance but requires manual implementation
Knowledge based on data up to February 2026; newer platform features may not be included

useCases.title: Ecommerce Email Strategy
useCases.description: Get a complete email marketing strategy for a Shopify DTC brand including automation flows, segmentation, and revenue benchmarks

useCases.title: Deliverability Diagnosis
useCases.description: Diagnose why emails are landing in spam and receive a step-by-step remediation plan covering authentication and content

useCases.targetUser: B2B sales teams and founders doing outbound
useCases.title: Cold Outreach Setup
useCases.description: Build a compliant cold email sequence with proper infrastructure, warming schedules, and follow-up sequences

promptTemplates.title: Email Setup Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review my current email marketing setup. I'm using [ESP name] for a [industry] business doing [revenue]/year. I have [list flows]. What am I missing?
promptTemplates.scenario: Get a comprehensive audit of existing email marketing

promptTemplates.title: Fix Deliverability Issue
promptTemplates.prompt: My emails are landing in [Gmail promotions / spam / primary] tab and my open rates dropped from [X]% to [Y]% over the last [time period]. What's going on and how do I fix it?
promptTemplates.scenario: Diagnose and fix inbox placement problems

promptTemplates.title: Build Automation Flow
promptTemplates.prompt: Build me a complete [welcome series / abandoned cart / win-back] email sequence for my [business type]. I sell [products]. Average order value is [AOV], repeat purchase cycle is [time].
promptTemplates.scenario: Create automated email flows from scratch

promptTemplates.title: Industry Benchmark Request
promptTemplates.prompt: What are the average open rates, click rates, and conversion rates for [industry]? What automation flows should I prioritize and what revenue per recipient should I target?

bestPractices: Start with the three core flows: welcome series, abandoned cart, and post-purchase before adding secondary automations
Use engagement-based sending - only send campaigns to subscribers who clicked in the last 30-60 days to protect sender reputation
Implement double opt-in for new subscribers to prevent spam traps and improve list quality
antiPatterns: Sending to your entire list without segmentation - this destroys sender reputation and lands emails in spam
Using a single email for both marketing and transactional messages - separate domains are essential for deliverability
Skipping authentication setup (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) before launching - Google/Yahoo require this for bulk senders

faq.question: Does this skill connect directly to my email platform?
faq.answer: No, this is a knowledge base skill that provides strategic guidance. It cannot directly access your ESP, import subscriber data, or send emails. You implement the recommendations manually in your email platform.

faq.question: What email platforms does this cover?
faq.answer: The skill covers Klaviyo, Mailchimp, Kit (ConvertKit), ActiveCampaign, HubSpot, Brevo, beehiiv, Omnisend, SmartrMail, Bento, and Postmark with honest comparisons based on your use case.

faq.question: How current is the data?
faq.answer: The knowledge base was last updated in February 2026 and includes the latest Google/Yahoo authentication requirements, Apple MPP impact, and current industry benchmarks.

faq.question: Can this help with cold email?
faq.answer: Yes, Chapter 13 covers cold email infrastructure, warming schedules, personalisation strategies, and compliance for B2B outreach in the US and UK.

faq.question: Does it cover compliance (GDPR, CAN-SPAM)?
faq.answer: Yes, Chapter 10 covers GDPR, CAN-SPAM, CASL, CCPA, and Australian Spam Act with key rules and penalties for each region.

faq.question: How do I use this with Claude Code?
faq.answer: Install the skill, then talk to Claude like an email marketing consultant. Ask questions, request flow builds, or ask for benchmarks. Claude will pull from the 55,000-word knowledge base to provide specific, actionable advice.
